# Java language server (jdtls) test

# Start acme-lsp server
mkdir .jdtls
acme-lsp -headless -rootdir $WORK -workspaces $WORK -server '\.java$:jdtls -data $WORK/.jdtls' &

# Format file
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#0'
L -headless fmt
cmp hello.java after-format.txt

# Definition of "HelloGreeter" from constructor call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#333'
L -headless def -p
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter \{'

# References to "HelloGreeter"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#333'
L -headless refs
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter \{'
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:.*HelloGreeter g = new HelloGreeter\(\);'

# Type definition of "g"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#346'
L -headless type -p
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter \{'

# Signature help does not seems to return anything in jdtls. Is it supported?
# Signature of "hello" method call
#env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#354'
#L -headless sig
#stdout 'hello\(\)'

# Hover over the "println" function call
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#227'
L -headless hov
stdout 'Prints a String and then terminates the line'

# Implementations of the "Greeter" interface
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#13'
L -headless impls
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter \{'

# Completion in the middle of method call "hello"
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#350'
L -headless comp
stdout 'hello\(\) : void	HelloGreeter\.hello\(\) : void'

# Print all symbols in the file
L -headless syms
stdout 'Greeter'
stdout 'HelloGreeter'
stdout 'hello\(\)  : void'
stdout 'Main'
stdout 'main\(String\[\]\)  : void'
stdout '/hello\.java:'

# Query workspace symbols
L -headless wss HelloGreeter
stdout 'hello\.java:.*:class HelloGreeter implements Greeter \{'

# Rename HelloGreeter to WorldGreeter
env acmeaddr=$WORK/hello.java:'#119'
retry L -headless rn WorldGreeter
cmp hello.java after-rename.txt

# Test command execution
L exec java.project.getAll
stdout 'file:.*'

-- hello.java --
interface Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a greeting */
	void hello(); }

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a hello greeting */
	public void hello() {
		System.out.println("Hello, 世界"); } }

class Main {
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		HelloGreeter g = new HelloGreeter();
		g.hello(); } }
-- after-format.txt --
interface Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a greeting */
	void hello();
}

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class HelloGreeter implements Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a hello greeting */
	public void hello() {
		System.out.println("Hello, 世界");
	}
}

class Main {
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		HelloGreeter g = new HelloGreeter();
		g.hello();
	}
}
-- after-rename.txt --
interface Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a greeting */
	void hello();
}

/** HelloGreeter greets with hello */
class WorldGreeter implements Greeter {
	/** Hello prints a hello greeting */
	public void hello() {
		System.out.println("Hello, 世界");
	}
}

class Main {
	public static void main(String[] args) {
		WorldGreeter g = new WorldGreeter();
		g.hello();
	}
}
